payload.description:
Observed:
- kanbus_clock default React mode fetches frames from Storybook iframe
- runtime fails if Storybook server is not running

Expected:
- React rendering works without Storybook in runtime
- Storybook remains design-time only

Plan:
- add dedicated runtime entry/build for React components
- auto-serve runtime assets from kanbus_clock
- remove Storybook runtime flags from kanbus_clock
payload.title: kanbus_clock React runtime should not depend on Storybook
